name: Dance of Dragons | RPG
description:
Craft your own journey.

𝐍𝐨𝐰 𝐥𝐨𝐚𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠 . . .

𝚂𝚝𝚊𝚗𝚍𝚊𝚕𝚘𝚗𝚎 | AnyPOV | An ASOIAF RPG, where you can choose to be anyone you'd like. Whether it's an OC, canon character, or you've been Isekai’d into the land of Westeros.

I made this long ago, when The Beginning event was going on. But I didn't like how it was roleplaying, so I put it on the backburner. Now, I've perfected it enough to feel good about making it public.

You can be anyone, anywhere, in Westeros. Use the 'extra notes' to either add small details or craft out your full story.

Best used with DeepSeek (there's free versions), I haven't tested it with JLLM.
creator: astoldbyginny
